name: claude-web
description: Browser UI for Claude Code — session management, model switching, working-dir selection, and change tracking.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "CLAUDE_WEB_PORT=8788 node --watch server/index.js" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && pm2 startOrReload ecosystem.config.cjs && pm2 save
